name: adelphos_domain_rebuild_drawing_issue_sheet_register_for_project
desc: Rebuild the Drawing Issue Sheet (.xlsx register) for a project. Client zips the project's 2.0 Issued folder and uploads it to the Adelphos Domain API; the rebuilt workbook is written back next to the source (or to save_to_path if provided). Requires an Adelphos JWT (see adelphos_domain_sign_in_with_jwt_for_user) and a prior grant on the folder via adelphos_domain_grant_local_path_for_user.

parameters.name: issued_folder_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to the project's '2.0 Issued' folder on this machine

parameters.name: project_name
parameters.description: Optional friendly project name for the workbook header

parameters.name: save_to_path
parameters.description: Optional absolute path to save the rebuilt .xlsx to. Default: {issued_folder_path}/Drawing Issue Sheet.xlsx

parameters.name: skip_notifications
parameters.description: If true, server will not send a notification on completion (default false)

parameters.name: include_undated_events
parameters.description: If true, folders without a YYYY.MM.DD prefix are also folded into the register (default false)
